analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will hold a video conference with officials from over 20 African countries and Africa CDC to share COVID-19 information, stating China and Africa have long supported each other and will continue to do so. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; emphasizes cooperation, support, sharing expertise, and ongoing mutual assistance with Africa, fitting China's cooperative, multilateral, supportive role. CH3 (epic history) – Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not discussed; focus is international cooperation, which belongs to CH2. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No claims about domestic achievements or leadership superiority. CH6 (culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
